lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: Oh... Sorry, we're not meant to talk to the nobles.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: Oh, hello, you must be new here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where are we?

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: What, you can't tell from your surroundings that you're in a mine? You must have been hit hard on the head to not notice that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: We're miners, perhaps that might give you a clue! We're forced to mine for those stinking vyres. Once we've filled the cart, they sometimes let us go back to Meiyerditch, but then we get tithed. Don't know if I

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: prefer it in here or out there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have a spare pick?

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: Sure, got one here you can use.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you get out of here?

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: They can't keep you in here forever because they have to tithe you, so once you've filled the cart, they let you go. Takes about fifteen loads to get the cart filled.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it that you're mining?

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: We're mining for daeyalt. Don't rightly know what it does - we don't ask too many questions - but I've been doing it since I was a kid. The carts keep getting filled, and they keep going along the tracks. Goes to some

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: huge refinery place, it does - massive, like another city under the earth.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? Have you seen this place?

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: Not myself, like, but other people I know of have seen it and they wouldn't lie!

lines.speaker: Juvinate guard
lines.text: You two shut up and get back to work!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: I feel so weak I could faint.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: I'm sick of this place.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: I hate those Vyres.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: Work work work, that's all I ever do.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: I can't think strait, I'm so tired.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: Ohh, my arms.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: Ohh, my back.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: I'm rich in experience, poor in wealth.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: I'm so tired, I could sleep standing up.

lines.speaker: Meiyerditch miner
lines.text: What I wouldn't give for a good night's rest.
